name: Udmurt
notes: Udmurt (удмурт кыл), a Permic (Uralic) language of the Udmurt Republic, Russia. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Script: Cyrillic alphabet — the Russian alphabet plus ⟨Ӝӝ Ӟӟ Ӥӥ Ӧӧ Ӵӵ⟩. A full spec must model the palatalisation contrast (soft sign, iotated vowel letters, and ⟨ӥ⟩ marking a preceding hard consonant), the affricate letters ⟨ӝ ӟ ӵ ч ц⟩ plus the digraph ⟨дз/дж⟩ usage, the vowel /ɘ/ written ⟨ӧ⟩, and the Russian-loanword letters. Input is assumed to be the modern Cyrillic Udmurt orthography.
